code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(p)
      match string.parse_int(p)
      when Some(n)
        nums = list.push(nums, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut sorted = true
  mut j = 1
  while j < nums.len()
    match nums.get(j - 1)
    when Some(a)
      match nums.get(j)
      when Some(b)
        if a > b
          sorted = false
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  if sorted
    print("YES")
  else
    print("NO")
  end
when None
  print("YES")
end
